name: aiwg-utils-skills
description: Cross-framework utility skills for AIWG orchestration

skills.name: artifact-metadata
skills.description: Artifact lifecycle tracking with versioning and ownership

skills.name: template-engine
skills.description: Template instantiation with context-aware variable substitution

skills.name: config-validator
skills.description: AIWG configuration validation and setup verification

skills.name: nl-router
skills.description: Natural language request routing to appropriate skills

skills.name: workspace-health
skills.description: Workspace alignment assessment and cleanup recommendations

skills.name: claims-validator
skills.description: Validates factual claims against source documents

skills.name: soul-create
skills.description: Generate SOUL.md identity files from source material or interactive prompts

skills.name: soul-validate
skills.description: Validate SOUL.md quality against community best practices

skills.name: soul-enhance
skills.description: Improve existing SOUL.md by resolving vague sections and generating calibration examples

skills.name: soul-apply
skills.description: Apply SOUL.md identity to content generation with worldview, opinions, and character

skills.name: soul-blend
skills.description: Merge multiple SOUL.md files into a composite persona with configurable conflict resolution

skills.name: aiwg-guide
skills.description: Contextual AIWG help — explains current version features, answers how-to questions, routes live queries to the steward

skills.name: new-project
skills.description: Scaffold a new AIWG-managed project with .aiwg/ directory structure, starter CLAUDE.md, and framework registry
triggers: set up aiwg for my project

usage: These skills are consumed by framework-specific skills and can be invoked directly for utility operations.
